name: LibreChat

inputs.label: Use NVIDIA GPU
inputs.help: Reserve an NVIDIA GPU. Requires the host to have an NVIDIA GPU + the NVIDIA Container Toolkit; leave off to run on CPU.

compose:
name: slashnode-librechat
services:
  api:
    image: ghcr.io/danny-avila/librechat:v0.8.7
    container_name: librechat-api
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: npm run backend
    depends_on:
      - mongodb
      - rag_api
    environment:
      HOST: 0.0.0.0
      MONGO_URI: mongodb://librechat-mongodb:27017/LibreChat
      MEILI_HOST: http://librechat-meilisearch:7700
      RAG_PORT: '8000'
      RAG_API_URL: http://librechat-rag_api:8000
      OPENAI_API_KEY: user_provided
      GOOGLE_KEY: user_provided
      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: user_provided
      ASSISTANTS_API_KEY: user_provided
      CREDS_KEY: f34be427ebb29de8d88c107a71546019685ed8b241d8f2ed00c3df97ad2566f0
      CREDS_IV: e2341419ec3dd3d19b13a1a87fafcbfb
      JWT_SECRET: 16f8c0ef4a5d391b26034086c628469d3f9f497f08163ab9b40137092f2909ef
      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: eaa5191f2914e30b9387fd84e254e4ba6fc51b4654968a9b0803b456a54b8418
    volumes:
      - api_data-api-librechat.yaml:/app/librechat.yaml
      - api_data-api-images:/app/client/public/images
      - api_data-api-uploads:/app/uploads
      - api_data-api-logs:/app/api/logs
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7050:3080
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:8.0.10
    container_name: librechat-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: mongod --noauth
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data-db:/data/db
  meilisearch:
    image: getmeili/meilisearch:v1.12.3
    container_name: librechat-meilisearch
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MEILI_HOST: http://librechat-meilisearch:7700
      MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS: 'true'
      MEILI_MASTER_KEY: DrhYf7zENyR6AlUCKmnz0eYASOQdl6zxH7s7MKFSfFCt
    volumes:
      - meilisearch_data-meilisearch:/meili_data
  vectordb:
    image: ankane/pgvector:v0.5.1
    container_name: librechat-vectordb
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: mydatabase
      POSTGRES_USER: myuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: mypassword
    volumes:
      - vectordb_data-vectordb:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  rag_api:
    image: ghcr.io/danny-avila/librechat-rag-api-dev-lite:v0.7.3
    container_name: librechat-rag_api
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - vectordb
    environment:
      DB_HOST: librechat-vectordb
      RAG_PORT: '8000'
      OPENAI_API_KEY: user_provided
      GOOGLE_KEY: user_provided
      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: user_provided
      ASSISTANTS_API_KEY: user_provided
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  api_data-api-librechat.yaml:
    name: slashnode-librechat_api_data-api-librechat.yaml
  api_data-api-images:
    name: slashnode-librechat_api_data-api-images
  api_data-api-uploads:
    name: slashnode-librechat_api_data-api-uploads
  api_data-api-logs:
    name: slashnode-librechat_api_data-api-logs
  mongodb_data-db:
    name: slashnode-librechat_mongodb_data-db
  meilisearch_data-meilisearch:
    name: slashnode-librechat_meilisearch_data-meilisearch
  vectordb_data-vectordb:
    name: slashnode-librechat_vectordb_data-vectordb
